mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RSN_RELEASE_UNIT ( RELEASE_UNIT_ID, PROJECT_ID, RELEASE_VERSION, RELEASE_STATUS, DESCRIPTION, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_BY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{releaseUnitId}, #{projectId}, #{releaseVersion}, #{releaseStatus}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, #{createdBy}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM RSN_RELEASE_UNIT WHERE PROJECT_ID = #{_parameter} ORDER BY CREATED_AT ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RSN_RUNTIME_PACKAGE ( RUNTIME_PACKAGE_ID, RELEASE_UNIT_ID, PACKAGE_TYPE, PACKAGE_HASH, ARTIFACT_PATH, FILE_SIZE, BUILD_RUN_ID, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_BY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{runtimePackageId}, #{releaseUnitId}, #{packageType}, #{packageHash}, #{artifactPath}, #{fileSize}, #{buildRunId}, 'SYSTEM', 'SYSTEM', #{createdAt, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridLocalDateTimeTypeHandler}, #{createdAt, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridLocalDateTimeTypeHandler} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM RSN_RUNTIME_PACKAGE WHERE RELEASE_UNIT_ID = #{_parameter} ORDER BY CREATED_AT ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RSN_DEPLOY_TRACE ( DEPLOY_TRACE_ID, RUNTIME_PACKAGE_ID, TARGET_ENV, DEPLOY_STATUS, OPERATOR_ID, DEPLOY_LOG, STARTED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_BY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{deployTraceId}, #{runtimePackageId}, #{targetEnv}, #{deployStatus}, #{operatorId}, #{deployLog}, #{startedAt, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridLocalDateTimeTypeHandler}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorId}, #{startedAt, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridLocalDateTimeTypeHandler}, #{startedAt, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridLocalDateTimeTypeHandler} )
mapper.select: SELECT T.* FROM RSN_DEPLOY_TRACE T JOIN RSN_RUNTIME_PACKAGE P ON T.RUNTIME_PACKAGE_ID = P.RUNTIME_PACKAGE_ID JOIN RSN_RELEASE_UNIT R ON P.RELEASE_UNIT_ID = R.RELEASE_UNIT_ID WHERE T.TARGET_ENV = #{targetEnv} AND R.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId} ORDER BY T.STARTED_AT DESC
